description: Free proof-of-existence attestation for digital files, MCP tools for the imgauth service.
name: io.github.SPAZIO-GENESI/attest-mcp

environmentVariables.description: API key credential for the attestation service (optional — bypasses the interactive device-flow authorization).
environmentVariables.name: IMGAUTH_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL, e.g. for local development against a `wrangler dev` instance.
environmentVariables.name: IMGAUTH_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Override the base URL used to build permanent certificate-verification page links.
environmentVariables.name: IMGAUTH_CERT_PAGE_BASE
